input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.5.4.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.5.4.2
            TITLE: liquid coolant for electric motors, accumulators or hv electronics must be one of:

            CONTENT:
            rule T.5.4.2: Liquid coolant for electric motors, Accumulators or HV electronics must be one of:
T.5.4.2 Liquid coolant for electric motors, Accumulators or HV electronics must be one of: 
• plain water with no additives  
• oil

final_answer: Liquid coolant for electric motors, Accumulators or HV electronics must be one of: • plain water with no additives • oil
